schema_changelog.2.4.0: Capabilities contract tightened with tier-required keys (status/tools) and readiness compatibility fallback via /api/v1/readyz
schema_changelog.2.3.0: Added health.overall and health.components in capabilities payload for truthful component-level status
schema_changelog.2.2.0: Added PATCH support for partial updates (brain_update); circuit breaker for Ollama
schema_changelog.2.1.0: Unified V1 API endpoints; corporate append-only enforcement; rate limiting
